App.tsx.changes: Complete refactor from placeholder to full routing implementation
key_features: AppLayout component managing navigation and routes
NavLink component with active state detection
Navigation with Home, FileText, Calendar icons
Link wrapper for navigation to editor
Type-safe icon mapping using ContentType enum
4 status states: draft, validated, scheduled, published
Grid layout: 4 stat cards, 2x1 content grid
Placeholder sections: upcoming schedule, recent validations
Header with title and 'New Content' button
Conditional title: new vs edit mode
EditorPage.tsx.gotcha: Hardcoded height depends on header being exactly 57px

patterns_discovered.name: React Router v6 Layout Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: BrowserRouter wrapper with nested Routes inside AppLayout component
patterns_discovered.benefit: Separates routing logic from layout concerns

patterns_discovered.name: Active Navigation Detection
patterns_discovered.description: useLocation hook with custom logic for root path vs subpaths

patterns_discovered.name: Type-Safe Icon Mapping
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures all content types have corresponding icons

patterns_discovered.name: Configuration Objects
patterns_discovered.description: Centralized mapping of status/types to display properties
patterns_discovered.benefit: Single source of truth for UI variations

patterns_discovered.name: Card Component Wrapper
patterns_discovered.description: Consistent Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent structure
patterns_discovered.benefit: Uniform styling and spacing across app

patterns_discovered.name: Empty State Pattern
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clear guidance for users on incomplete features

patterns_discovered.name: Link-Wrapped Cards
patterns_discovered.description: Entire card wrapped in Link for navigation
patterns_discovered.benefit: Large clickable area for better UX

gotchas_discovered.detail: h-[calc(100vh-57px)] assumes header is exactly 57px tall
gotchas_discovered.impact: If header height changes, editor layout breaks

gotchas_discovered.detail: Root path requires exact match (/) vs other paths use startsWith
gotchas_discovered.impact: Navigation at other paths might incorrectly highlight root

gotchas_discovered.detail: Entire card wrapped in Link, no way to interact with status badge separately
gotchas_discovered.impact: May prevent future interactive features on badge

gotchas_discovered.detail: /content/new routes to EditorPage which checks id === 'new'
gotchas_discovered.impact: Works correctly but requires exact string match convention

gotchas_discovered.detail: Routes have no error fallback or 404 handling

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully established complete routing architecture with 7 new/modified files implementing main layout, navigation, 4 page shells, and 2 reusable components
achievements: React Router v6 setup with BrowserRouter and nested Routes
Working navigation with active state styling
4 functional page components with proper layouts
2 reusable components (StatusBadge, ContentCard) with type safety
Placeholder content for future feature implementation
approach_outcome.scope_coverage: Exceeded - all requirements met plus additional NavLink component and StatCard subcomponent

recommendations.suggestion: Extract hardcoded header height (57px) to CSS variable or constant
recommendations.rationale: Height used in EditorPage calculation should be configurable in one place
Invalid routes currently show nothing; should have user-friendly error page

recommendations.suggestion: Extract NavLink styling to constants or separate file
recommendations.rationale: Long className string in NavLink is hard to maintain
4 page components could be code-split for better performance

recommendations.suggestion: Ensure NavLink active state has sufficient contrast
recommendations.rationale: bg-gray-100 on gray-50 may not meet WCAG standards

recommendations.suggestion: Consider extract ContentCard link logic to allow custom actions
recommendations.rationale: May need non-navigation interactions with card in future

recommendations.suggestion: Add tests for NavLink active state detection
recommendations.rationale: Complex path-matching logic should have coverage
